Hib Vaccination: Information for Healthcare Professionals 
Print 
Minus 
Related Pages 
Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) vaccines help prevent Hib disease, but not illness from other strains of H. influenzae bacteria.
Hib Vaccine Recommendations About Hib Vaccines Storage and Handling for Hib Vaccines Administering Hib Vaccines Hib Vaccine Resources You Call the Shots 
You Call the Shots is an interactive, web-based immunization training course. It consists of a series of modules that discuss vaccine-preventable diseases and explain the latest recommendations for vaccine use. Each module provides learning opportunities, self-test practice questions, reference and resource materials, and an extensive glo
